items.text: 我喜欢动手搭建、修理或改装东西。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢动手搭建、修理或改装东西。
items.text_en: I enjoy building, repairing, or modifying things by hand.

items.text: 结果直观、看得见摸得着的任务会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 结果直观、看得见摸得着的任务会吸引我。
items.text_en: Tasks with visible, tangible results appeal to me.

items.text: 使用工具、设备或机械让我感到自在。
items.text_zh: 使用工具、设备或机械让我感到自在。
items.text_en: Using tools, equipment, or machinery feels comfortable to me.

items.text: 比起长时间讨论，我更喜欢直接上手做。
items.text_zh: 比起长时间讨论，我更喜欢直接上手做。
items.text_en: Compared with long discussions, I prefer to get hands-on and do the work directly.

items.text: 我喜欢解决机械、设备或技术故障。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢解决机械、设备或技术故障。
items.text_en: I enjoy troubleshooting mechanical, equipment, or technical problems.

items.text: 我愿意在现场完成需要操作和调整的工作。
items.text_zh: 我愿意在现场完成需要操作和调整的工作。
items.text_en: I am willing to complete work on site that requires operation and adjustment.

items.text: 我对器材、结构或系统如何运作很感兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对器材、结构或系统如何运作很感兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in how equipment, structures, or systems work.

items.text: 需要手眼协调和实际操作的任务让我有投入感。
items.text_zh: 需要手眼协调和实际操作的任务让我有投入感。
items.text_en: Tasks that require hand-eye coordination and practical operation draw me in.

items.text: 把想法变成实体、样品或可执行成果会让我满足。
items.text_zh: 把想法变成实体、样品或可执行成果会让我满足。
items.text_en: Turning ideas into physical objects, prototypes, or executable outcomes feels satisfying to me.

items.text: 我愿意接触户外、工地、实验场或生产现场类情境。
items.text_zh: 我愿意接触户外、工地、实验场或生产现场类情境。
items.text_en: I am willing to work in settings such as outdoor sites, work sites, labs, or production environments.

items.text: 我喜欢分析复杂问题并找出原因。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢分析复杂问题并找出原因。
items.text_en: I enjoy analyzing complex problems and finding their causes.

items.text: 数据、证据和逻辑会激发我的好奇心。
items.text_zh: 数据、证据和逻辑会激发我的好奇心。
items.text_en: Data, evidence, and logic spark my curiosity.

items.text: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_zh: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_en: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.

items.text: 阅读和理解有难度的概念会让我投入。
items.text_zh: 阅读和理解有难度的概念会让我投入。
items.text_en: Reading and understanding challenging concepts draws me in.

items.text: 我喜欢从信息中识别规律或模型。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从信息中识别规律或模型。
items.text_en: I enjoy identifying patterns or models in information.

items.text: 需要严谨思考的工作更容易吸引我。
items.text_zh: 需要严谨思考的工作更容易吸引我。
items.text_en: Work that requires rigorous thinking is more likely to attract me.

items.text: 面对未知问题，我愿意先提出假设再验证。
items.text_zh: 面对未知问题，我愿意先提出假设再验证。
items.text_en: When facing an unfamiliar problem, I am willing to form hypotheses and then test them.

items.text: 比起凭直觉判断，我更喜欢用事实推理。
items.text_zh: 比起凭直觉判断，我更喜欢用事实推理。
items.text_en: Compared with judging by intuition, I prefer reasoning from facts.

items.text: 我喜欢把模糊问题拆解成可分析的部分。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把模糊问题拆解成可分析的部分。
items.text_en: I enjoy breaking vague problems into parts that can be analyzed.

items.text: 长时间独立思考、研究或探索答案不会让我厌烦。
items.text_zh: 长时间独立思考、研究或探索答案不会让我厌烦。
items.text_en: Long periods of independent thinking, research, or exploration do not bore me.

items.text: 我喜欢创造新点子和原创成果。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢创造新点子和原创成果。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating new ideas and original work.

items.text: 表达自我是我工作动力的重要来源。
items.text_zh: 表达自我是我工作动力的重要来源。
items.text_en: Self-expression is an important source of work motivation for me.

items.text: 我喜欢尝试不同风格和表达方式。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢尝试不同风格和表达方式。
items.text_en: I enjoy trying different styles and ways of expression.

items.text: 相比固定流程，我更喜欢开放式任务。
items.text_zh: 相比固定流程，我更喜欢开放式任务。
items.text_en: Compared with fixed procedures, I prefer open-ended tasks.

items.text: 视觉、文字、声音或概念设计类工作会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 视觉、文字、声音或概念设计类工作会吸引我。
items.text_en: Work involving visual, written, audio, or conceptual design appeals to me.

items.text: 创造性探索会让我更有能量。
items.text_zh: 创造性探索会让我更有能量。
items.text_en: Creative exploration gives me more energy.

items.text: 我喜欢把抽象感觉转化为作品、内容或方案。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把抽象感觉转化为作品、内容或方案。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning abstract feelings into work, content, or solutions.

items.text: 我愿意从零开始构思，而不是只按模板执行。
items.text_zh: 我愿意从零开始构思，而不是只按模板执行。
items.text_en: I am willing to develop ideas from scratch rather than only follow templates.

items.text: 当一件事可以做得更有美感或更有个性时，我会更投入。
items.text_zh: 当一件事可以做得更有美感或更有个性时，我会更投入。
items.text_en: When something can be made more aesthetic or more personal, I become more engaged.

items.text: 我享受在没有标准答案的情况下进行创作。
items.text_zh: 我享受在没有标准答案的情况下进行创作。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating when there is no single standard answer.

items.text: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others solve problems.

items.text: 我重视团队氛围和人际关系。
items.text_zh: 我重视团队氛围和人际关系。
items.text_en: I value team atmosphere and interpersonal relationships.

items.text: 我愿意耐心倾听他人。
items.text_zh: 我愿意耐心倾听他人。
items.text_en: I am willing to listen to others patiently.

items.text: 包含辅导、支持或服务职责的角色会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 包含辅导、支持或服务职责的角色会吸引我。
items.text_en: Roles that include coaching, support, or service responsibilities appeal to me.

items.text: 当工作能真正帮助别人时，我会更有成就感。
items.text_zh: 当工作能真正帮助别人时，我会更有成就感。
items.text_en: When work can genuinely help other people, I feel a stronger sense of achievement.

items.text: 我喜欢协调多方协作，让事情顺利推进。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢协调多方协作，让事情顺利推进。
items.text_en: I enjoy coordinating collaboration among different people so things move forward smoothly.

items.text: 我愿意花时间理解他人的需求、情绪或难处。
items.text_zh: 我愿意花时间理解他人的需求、情绪或难处。
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time understanding other people's needs, emotions, or difficulties.

items.text: 我喜欢通过沟通让他人更安心、更清晰或更有方向。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过沟通让他人更安心、更清晰或更有方向。
items.text_en: I enjoy using communication to help others feel more reassured, clearer, or more directed.

items.text: 看到别人因我的支持而进步，我会很满足。
items.text_zh: 看到别人因我的支持而进步，我会很满足。
items.text_en: Seeing others make progress because of my support feels satisfying to me.

items.text: 我喜欢需要合作、陪伴或群体互动的工作场景。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢需要合作、陪伴或群体互动的工作场景。
items.text_en: I enjoy work settings that require cooperation, companionship, or group interaction.

items.text: 我喜欢通过观点影响他人。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过观点影响他人。
items.text_en: I enjoy influencing others through ideas and viewpoints.

items.text: 主导推进事项会让我更有动力。
items.text_zh: 主导推进事项会让我更有动力。
items.text_en: Taking the lead in moving things forward gives me more motivation.

items.text: 我喜欢设定目标并推动结果达成。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢设定目标并推动结果达成。
items.text_en: I enjoy setting goals and driving results to completion.

items.text: 我能适应谈判、争取资源或说服他人的场景。
items.text_zh: 我能适应谈判、争取资源或说服他人的场景。
items.text_en: I can adapt to situations involving negotiation, resource seeking, or persuasion.

items.text: 偏商业导向、增长导向的挑战会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 偏商业导向、增长导向的挑战会吸引我。
items.text_en: Business-oriented and growth-oriented challenges appeal to me.

items.text: 在压力下主动承担责任会让我更有存在感。
items.text_zh: 在压力下主动承担责任会让我更有存在感。
items.text_en: Taking responsibility under pressure gives me a stronger sense of presence.

items.text: 我愿意带头组织资源、人和节奏去完成目标。
items.text_zh: 我愿意带头组织资源、人和节奏去完成目标。
items.text_en: I am willing to lead the coordination of resources, people, and pace to achieve a goal.

items.text: 我喜欢竞争、突破和把机会变成结果的过程。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢竞争、突破和把机会变成结果的过程。
items.text_en: I enjoy the process of competition, breakthrough, and turning opportunities into results.

items.text: 当一个项目需要有人站出来拍板时，我愿意担当。
items.text_zh: 当一个项目需要有人站出来拍板时，我愿意担当。
items.text_en: When a project needs someone to step up and make decisions, I am willing to take that role.

items.text: 我对市场、业务、创业或对外拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对市场、业务、创业或对外拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving markets, business, entrepreneurship, or external development.

items.text: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_zh: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_en: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.

items.text: 我重视细节以及质量校验。
items.text_zh: 我重视细节以及质量校验。
items.text_en: I value details and quality checks.

items.text: 我喜欢规划安排并跟踪进度。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢规划安排并跟踪进度。
items.text_en: I enjoy planning, arranging, and tracking progress.

items.text: 对重复但重要的任务，我能稳定执行并且不排斥。
items.text_zh: 对重复但重要的任务，我能稳定执行并且不排斥。
items.text_en: For repetitive but important tasks, I can execute steadily and do not reject them.

items.text: 规范、一致性和文档化会让我更安心。
items.text_zh: 规范、一致性和文档化会让我更安心。
items.text_en: Standards, consistency, and documentation make me feel more secure.

items.text: 我喜欢组织、整理和运营执行类工作。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢组织、整理和运营执行类工作。
items.text_en: I enjoy work involving organization, sorting, operations, and execution.

items.text: 我愿意维护台账、清单、记录或标准作业流程。
items.text_zh: 我愿意维护台账、清单、记录或标准作业流程。
items.text_en: I am willing to maintain ledgers, checklists, records, or standard operating procedures.

items.text: 明确规则和职责边界的环境会让我更高效。
items.text_zh: 明确规则和职责边界的环境会让我更高效。
items.text_en: Environments with clear rules and responsibility boundaries make me more efficient.

items.text: 我喜欢把杂乱信息整理成清楚的分类和顺序。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把杂乱信息整理成清楚的分类和顺序。
items.text_en: I enjoy organizing messy information into clear categories and sequences.

items.text: 当事情被安排得井井有条时，我会更有满足感。
items.text_zh: 当事情被安排得井井有条时，我会更有满足感。
items.text_en: When things are arranged in an orderly way, I feel more satisfied.

items.text: 我喜欢拆解一个装置，再理解各部件如何配合。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢拆解一个装置，再理解各部件如何配合。
items.text_en: I enjoy taking a device apart and understanding how its parts work together.

items.text: 我愿意通过试装、调试或校准来改进成品。
items.text_zh: 我愿意通过试装、调试或校准来改进成品。
items.text_en: I am willing to improve finished work through trial assembly, testing, or calibration.

items.text: 需要快速判断并现场处理问题的任务会让我兴奋。
items.text_zh: 需要快速判断并现场处理问题的任务会让我兴奋。
items.text_en: Tasks that require quick judgment and on-site problem handling excite me.

items.text: 我喜欢把图纸、说明或想法转成实物成果。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把图纸、说明或想法转成实物成果。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning drawings, instructions, or ideas into physical outcomes.

items.text: 面对器材或流程异常，我会想亲自去排查。
items.text_zh: 面对器材或流程异常，我会想亲自去排查。
items.text_en: When equipment or processes behave abnormally, I want to investigate them myself.

items.text: 我对需要耐力、协调或空间感的实操任务有兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对需要耐力、协调或空间感的实操任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in hands-on tasks that require endurance, coordination, or spatial awareness.

items.text: 我偏好能看到设备、材料、样品或操作对象的工作环境。
items.text_zh: 我偏好能看到设备、材料、样品或操作对象的工作环境。
items.text_en: I prefer work environments where I can see equipment, materials, samples, or objects of operation.

items.text: 比起纯办公室环境，我更喜欢带有现场感或实物接触的场景。
items.text_zh: 比起纯办公室环境，我更喜欢带有现场感或实物接触的场景。
items.text_en: Compared with a purely office-based environment, I prefer settings with a sense of site work or contact with physical objects.

items.text: 能够在真实系统、真实产品或真实空间中工作，会让我更投入。
items.text_zh: 能够在真实系统、真实产品或真实空间中工作，会让我更投入。
items.text_en: Working with real systems, real products, or real spaces makes me more engaged.

items.text: 在团队中，我愿意承担安装、实施或落地执行的角色。
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意承担安装、实施或落地执行的角色。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to take on installation, implementation, or practical execution roles.

items.text: 当项目进入“把方案做出来”的阶段，我会更想参与。
items.text_zh: 当项目进入“把方案做出来”的阶段，我会更想参与。
items.text_en: When a project reaches the stage of making the plan real, I want to be more involved.

items.text: 我更喜欢成为把事情做成、做稳的人，而不是只停留在讨论层面。
items.text_zh: 我更喜欢成为把事情做成、做稳的人，而不是只停留在讨论层面。
items.text_en: I prefer being the person who gets things built and stabilized, rather than staying only at the discussion level.

items.text: 我喜欢阅读报告、论文或资料来建立判断。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢阅读报告、论文或资料来建立判断。
items.text_en: I enjoy reading reports, papers, or materials to build my judgment.

items.text: 对一个问题进行比较、分类和验证会让我有满足感。
items.text_zh: 对一个问题进行比较、分类和验证会让我有满足感。
items.text_en: Comparing, classifying, and verifying a problem gives me a sense of satisfaction.

items.text: 我乐于设计研究路径，而不只是接受现成答案。
items.text_zh: 我乐于设计研究路径，而不只是接受现成答案。
items.text_en: I enjoy designing a research path rather than only accepting ready-made answers.

items.text: 我喜欢用模型、框架或假设来理解复杂现象。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢用模型、框架或假设来理解复杂现象。
items.text_en: I enjoy using models, frameworks, or hypotheses to understand complex phenomena.

items.text: 需要精确推理的任务比情绪化判断更吸引我。
items.text_zh: 需要精确推理的任务比情绪化判断更吸引我。
items.text_en: Tasks that require precise reasoning appeal to me more than emotion-driven judgments.

items.text: 我愿意反复核对信息，只为确认结论是否可靠。
items.text_zh: 我愿意反复核对信息，只为确认结论是否可靠。
items.text_en: I am willing to check information repeatedly to confirm whether a conclusion is reliable.

items.text: 我偏好鼓励提问、质疑和求证的工作环境。
items.text_zh: 我偏好鼓励提问、质疑和求证的工作环境。
items.text_en: I prefer work environments that encourage questions, challenge, and verification.

items.text: 在可以安静思考、深入研究的场景里，我通常表现更好。
items.text_zh: 在可以安静思考、深入研究的场景里，我通常表现更好。
items.text_en: I usually perform better in settings where I can think quietly and research deeply.

items.text: 我喜欢重视专业判断和证据质量的组织氛围。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢重视专业判断和证据质量的组织氛围。
items.text_en: I enjoy organizational climates that value professional judgment and evidence quality.

items.text: 在团队里，我愿意扮演分析者、研究者或问题诊断者。
items.text_zh: 在团队里，我愿意扮演分析者、研究者或问题诊断者。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to play the role of analyst, researcher, or problem diagnostician.

items.text: 当别人需要把复杂问题想清楚时，我愿意接手。
items.text_zh: 当别人需要把复杂问题想清楚时，我愿意接手。
items.text_en: When others need to make sense of a complex problem, I am willing to take it on.

items.text: 我更希望因“看得深、想得准”而被需要。
items.text_zh: 我更希望因“看得深、想得准”而被需要。
items.text_en: I would rather be needed for seeing deeply and thinking accurately.

items.text: 我喜欢把普通内容做出独特风格。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把普通内容做出独特风格。
items.text_en: I enjoy giving ordinary content a distinctive style.

items.text: 我愿意为一个作品反复打磨形式、语感或审美效果。
items.text_zh: 我愿意为一个作品反复打磨形式、语感或审美效果。
items.text_en: I am willing to polish the form, wording, or aesthetic effect of a piece of work repeatedly.

items.text: 我喜欢从灵感、情绪或体验中生成创意。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从灵感、情绪或体验中生成创意。
items.text_en: I enjoy generating ideas from inspiration, emotion, or experience.

items.text: 当需要打破常规、换个角度思考时，我会更兴奋。
items.text_zh: 当需要打破常规、换个角度思考时，我会更兴奋。
items.text_en: When a situation calls for breaking convention and thinking from another angle, I feel more excited.

items.text: 我乐于把复杂想法转成更有感染力的表达。
items.text_zh: 我乐于把复杂想法转成更有感染力的表达。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning complex ideas into more compelling expression.

items.text: 我对品牌、叙事、内容、视觉或体验设计有兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对品牌、叙事、内容、视觉或体验设计有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in branding, storytelling, content, visual, or experience design.

items.text: 我喜欢允许试错和个性表达的工作环境。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢允许试错和个性表达的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy work environments that allow experimentation and personal expression.

items.text: 在审美、创意和独立判断被尊重的团队里，我会更投入。
items.text_zh: 在审美、创意和独立判断被尊重的团队里，我会更投入。
items.text_en: I become more engaged in teams where aesthetics, creativity, and independent judgment are respected.

items.text: 过于僵化、标准化的环境会压制我的发挥。
items.text_zh: 过于僵化、标准化的环境会压制我的发挥。
items.text_en: Overly rigid and standardized environments suppress my performance.

items.text: 在团队中，我愿意承担创意提出者或内容塑造者的角色。
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意承担创意提出者或内容塑造者的角色。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to take on the role of idea contributor or content shaper.

items.text: 当一个项目需要“让它更有表达力”时，我会想加入。
items.text_zh: 当一个项目需要“让它更有表达力”时，我会想加入。
items.text_en: When a project needs to become more expressive, I want to join in.

items.text: 我更希望因新颖、敏感和有想法而被看到。
items.text_zh: 我更希望因新颖、敏感和有想法而被看到。
items.text_en: I would rather be noticed for being novel, perceptive, and full of ideas.

items.text: 我喜欢帮助他人厘清问题，而不只是给出答案。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人厘清问题，而不只是给出答案。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others clarify problems, not just giving answers.

items.text: 我愿意在冲突或分歧中帮助各方恢复理解。
items.text_zh: 我愿意在冲突或分歧中帮助各方恢复理解。
items.text_en: I am willing to help different sides restore understanding during conflict or disagreement.

items.text: 我对培训、辅导、陪伴或社区支持类任务有兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对培训、辅导、陪伴或社区支持类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving training, coaching, companionship, or community support.

items.text: 我喜欢通过提问和反馈帮助别人更清晰地前进。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过提问和反馈帮助别人更清晰地前进。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others move forward with more clarity through questions and feedback.

items.text: 我乐于让新成员、更弱势者或更迷茫的人感到被接住。
items.text_zh: 我乐于让新成员、更弱势者或更迷茫的人感到被接住。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping new members, people in weaker positions, or people who feel lost feel supported.

items.text: 我愿意花时间让团队关系更顺畅、更有信任。
items.text_zh: 我愿意花时间让团队关系更顺畅、更有信任。
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time making team relationships smoother and more trusting.

items.text: 我喜欢合作氛围强、彼此支持的工作环境。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢合作氛围强、彼此支持的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy work environments with strong collaboration and mutual support.

items.text: 在能持续接触真实人群和真实需求的场景里，我会更有动力。
items.text_zh: 在能持续接触真实人群和真实需求的场景里，我会更有动力。
items.text_en: I feel more motivated in settings where I can stay in contact with real people and real needs.

items.text: 我偏好重视服务、教育、公益或社区价值的组织。
items.text_zh: 我偏好重视服务、教育、公益或社区价值的组织。
items.text_en: I prefer organizations that value service, education, public benefit, or community value.

items.text: 在团队中，我愿意扮演协调者、支持者或赋能者。
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意扮演协调者、支持者或赋能者。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to play the role of coordinator, supporter, or enabler.

items.text: 当大家需要一个能把人连接起来的人时，我愿意站出来。
items.text_zh: 当大家需要一个能把人连接起来的人时，我愿意站出来。
items.text_en: When people need someone who can connect them, I am willing to step forward.

items.text: 我更希望因“让别人变得更好”而被认可。
items.text_zh: 我更希望因“让别人变得更好”而被认可。
items.text_en: I would rather be recognized for helping others become better.

items.text: 我喜欢把一个模糊机会推进成明确结果。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把一个模糊机会推进成明确结果。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning a vague opportunity into a clear result.

items.text: 我愿意主动争取资源、合作或支持来推动目标。
items.text_zh: 我愿意主动争取资源、合作或支持来推动目标。
items.text_en: I am willing to proactively seek resources, cooperation, or support to move goals forward.

items.text: 当需要公开表达、展示方案或带动他人时，我通常不排斥。
items.text_zh: 当需要公开表达、展示方案或带动他人时，我通常不排斥。
items.text_en: When public expression, presenting a proposal, or mobilizing others is needed, I usually do not reject it.

items.text: 我喜欢在不确定中判断方向并先行一步。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢在不确定中判断方向并先行一步。
items.text_en: I enjoy judging direction amid uncertainty and taking the first step.

items.text: 我对销售、商务、增长、筹资或项目拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对销售、商务、增长、筹资或项目拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving sales, business development, growth, fundraising, or project expansion.

items.text: 当目标清晰且有挑战时，我会自然进入推进状态。
items.text_zh: 当目标清晰且有挑战时，我会自然进入推进状态。
items.text_en: When the goal is clear and challenging, I naturally enter a drive-forward state.

items.text: 我喜欢节奏快、结果导向强的工作环境。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢节奏快、结果导向强的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy fast-paced, strongly results-oriented work environments.

items.text: 在可以承担更大责任、影响更大结果的场景里，我会更兴奋。
items.text_zh: 在可以承担更大责任、影响更大结果的场景里，我会更兴奋。
items.text_en: I feel more excited in settings where I can take on greater responsibility and influence larger outcomes.

items.text: 我偏好鼓励试错、竞争和主动争取机会的组织氛围。
items.text_zh: 我偏好鼓励试错、竞争和主动争取机会的组织氛围。
items.text_en: I prefer organizational climates that encourage experimentation, competition, and proactively seeking opportunities.

items.text: 在团队中，我愿意担当负责人、发起人或对外代表。
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意担当负责人、发起人或对外代表。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to serve as the person in charge, initiator, or external representative.

items.text: 当项目需要有人定方向、定节奏并推动落地时，我愿意接手。
items.text_zh: 当项目需要有人定方向、定节奏并推动落地时，我愿意接手。
items.text_en: When a project needs someone to set direction, set pace, and push implementation, I am willing to take it on.

items.text: 我更希望因“能把事做成”而被信任。
items.text_zh: 我更希望因“能把事做成”而被信任。
items.text_en: I would rather be trusted for being able to get things done.

items.text: 我喜欢建立模板、规则或清单来减少混乱。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢建立模板、规则或清单来减少混乱。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating templates, rules, or checklists to reduce disorder.

items.text: 我愿意持续维护数据、记录和文档的准确性。
items.text_zh: 我愿意持续维护数据、记录和文档的准确性。
items.text_en: I am willing to keep data, records, and documents accurate over time.

items.text: 我喜欢把一个流程拆成可重复执行的步骤。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把一个流程拆成可重复执行的步骤。
items.text_en: I enjoy breaking a process into repeatable steps.

items.text: 当任务需要耐心校对、复核和归档时，我通常能投入。
items.text_zh: 当任务需要耐心校对、复核和归档时，我通常能投入。
items.text_en: When a task requires patient checking, review, and filing, I can usually stay engaged.

items.text: 我对预算、排期、台账、流程管理或行政运营类任务有兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对预算、排期、台账、流程管理或行政运营类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving budgeting, scheduling, ledgers, process management, or administrative operations.

items.text: 我喜欢让协作过程更有秩序、可跟踪、可交接。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢让协作过程更有秩序、可跟踪、可交接。
items.text_en: I enjoy making collaboration more orderly, trackable, and transferable.

items.text: 我喜欢职责清晰、标准明确、节奏稳定的工作环境。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢职责清晰、标准明确、节奏稳定的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy work environments with clear responsibilities, clear standards, and a stable rhythm.

items.text: 在规则清楚、资料完整的组织里，我通常更高效。
items.text_zh: 在规则清楚、资料完整的组织里，我通常更高效。
items.text_en: I am usually more efficient in organizations with clear rules and complete materials.

items.text: 我偏好重视合规、准确和交付质量的团队氛围。
items.text_zh: 我偏好重视合规、准确和交付质量的团队氛围。
items.text_en: I prefer team climates that value compliance, accuracy, and delivery quality.

items.text: 在团队中，我愿意扮演计划者、记录者或流程守护者。
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意扮演计划者、记录者或流程守护者。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to play the role of planner, recorder, or process guardian.

items.text: 当事情开始变乱时，我会想把它重新整理出秩序。
items.text_zh: 当事情开始变乱时，我会想把它重新整理出秩序。
items.text_en: When things start to become messy, I want to restore order.

items.text: 我更希望因可靠、细致和可复用而被需要。
items.text_zh: 我更希望因可靠、细致和可复用而被需要。
items.text_en: I would rather be needed for being reliable, detail-oriented, and reusable.

items.text: 为了确认你有认真作答，请本题选择“3 不确定 / 中立”。
items.text_zh: 为了确认你有认真作答，请本题选择“3 不确定 / 中立”。
items.text_en: To confirm that you are answering attentively, please choose '3 Unsure / neutral' for this item.

items.text: 我对几乎所有类型的工作都同样感兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对几乎所有类型的工作都同样感兴趣。
items.text_en: I am equally interested in almost every type of work.

items.text: 我从不在任何情境下犯错。
items.text_zh: 我从不在任何情境下犯错。
items.text_en: I never make mistakes in any situation.

items.text: 即使工作内容完全陌生，我也总能立刻喜欢上它。
items.text_zh: 即使工作内容完全陌生，我也总能立刻喜欢上它。
items.text_en: Even when work content is completely unfamiliar, I can always like it immediately.

items.text: 为了确认注意力，本题请选择“2 不喜欢”。
items.text_zh: 为了确认注意力，本题请选择“2 不喜欢”。
items.text_en: To confirm attention, please choose '2 Dislike' for this item.

items.text: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_zh: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_en: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.

items.text: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others solve problems.

items.text: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_zh: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_en: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.

items.text: I enjoy building, repairing, or modifying things by hand.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢动手搭建、修理或改装东西。
items.text_en: I enjoy building, repairing, or modifying things by hand.

items.text: Tasks with visible, tangible results appeal to me.
items.text_zh: 结果直观、看得见摸得着的任务会吸引我。
items.text_en: Tasks with visible, tangible results appeal to me.

items.text: Using tools, equipment, or machinery feels comfortable to me.
items.text_zh: 使用工具、设备或机械让我感到自在。
items.text_en: Using tools, equipment, or machinery feels comfortable to me.

items.text: Compared with long discussions, I prefer to get hands-on and do the work directly.
items.text_zh: 比起长时间讨论，我更喜欢直接上手做。
items.text_en: Compared with long discussions, I prefer to get hands-on and do the work directly.

items.text: I enjoy troubleshooting mechanical, equipment, or technical problems.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢解决机械、设备或技术故障。
items.text_en: I enjoy troubleshooting mechanical, equipment, or technical problems.

items.text: I am willing to complete work on site that requires operation and adjustment.
items.text_zh: 我愿意在现场完成需要操作和调整的工作。
items.text_en: I am willing to complete work on site that requires operation and adjustment.

items.text: I am interested in how equipment, structures, or systems work.
items.text_zh: 我对器材、结构或系统如何运作很感兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in how equipment, structures, or systems work.

items.text: Tasks that require hand-eye coordination and practical operation draw me in.
items.text_zh: 需要手眼协调和实际操作的任务让我有投入感。
items.text_en: Tasks that require hand-eye coordination and practical operation draw me in.

items.text: Turning ideas into physical objects, prototypes, or executable outcomes feels satisfying to me.
items.text_zh: 把想法变成实体、样品或可执行成果会让我满足。
items.text_en: Turning ideas into physical objects, prototypes, or executable outcomes feels satisfying to me.

items.text: I am willing to work in settings such as outdoor sites, work sites, labs, or production environments.
items.text_zh: 我愿意接触户外、工地、实验场或生产现场类情境。
items.text_en: I am willing to work in settings such as outdoor sites, work sites, labs, or production environments.

items.text: I enjoy analyzing complex problems and finding their causes.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢分析复杂问题并找出原因。
items.text_en: I enjoy analyzing complex problems and finding their causes.

items.text: Data, evidence, and logic spark my curiosity.
items.text_zh: 数据、证据和逻辑会激发我的好奇心。
items.text_en: Data, evidence, and logic spark my curiosity.

items.text: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.
items.text_zh: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_en: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.

items.text: Reading and understanding challenging concepts draws me in.
items.text_zh: 阅读和理解有难度的概念会让我投入。
items.text_en: Reading and understanding challenging concepts draws me in.

items.text: I enjoy identifying patterns or models in information.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从信息中识别规律或模型。
items.text_en: I enjoy identifying patterns or models in information.

items.text: Work that requires rigorous thinking is more likely to attract me.
items.text_zh: 需要严谨思考的工作更容易吸引我。
items.text_en: Work that requires rigorous thinking is more likely to attract me.

items.text: When facing an unfamiliar problem, I am willing to form hypotheses and then test them.
items.text_zh: 面对未知问题，我愿意先提出假设再验证。
items.text_en: When facing an unfamiliar problem, I am willing to form hypotheses and then test them.

items.text: Compared with judging by intuition, I prefer reasoning from facts.
items.text_zh: 比起凭直觉判断，我更喜欢用事实推理。
items.text_en: Compared with judging by intuition, I prefer reasoning from facts.

items.text: I enjoy breaking vague problems into parts that can be analyzed.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把模糊问题拆解成可分析的部分。
items.text_en: I enjoy breaking vague problems into parts that can be analyzed.

items.text: Long periods of independent thinking, research, or exploration do not bore me.
items.text_zh: 长时间独立思考、研究或探索答案不会让我厌烦。
items.text_en: Long periods of independent thinking, research, or exploration do not bore me.

items.text: I enjoy creating new ideas and original work.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢创造新点子和原创成果。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating new ideas and original work.

items.text: Self-expression is an important source of work motivation for me.
items.text_zh: 表达自我是我工作动力的重要来源。
items.text_en: Self-expression is an important source of work motivation for me.

items.text: I enjoy trying different styles and ways of expression.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢尝试不同风格和表达方式。
items.text_en: I enjoy trying different styles and ways of expression.

items.text: Compared with fixed procedures, I prefer open-ended tasks.
items.text_zh: 相比固定流程，我更喜欢开放式任务。
items.text_en: Compared with fixed procedures, I prefer open-ended tasks.

items.text: Work involving visual, written, audio, or conceptual design appeals to me.
items.text_zh: 视觉、文字、声音或概念设计类工作会吸引我。
items.text_en: Work involving visual, written, audio, or conceptual design appeals to me.

items.text: Creative exploration gives me more energy.
items.text_zh: 创造性探索会让我更有能量。
items.text_en: Creative exploration gives me more energy.

items.text: I enjoy turning abstract feelings into work, content, or solutions.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把抽象感觉转化为作品、内容或方案。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning abstract feelings into work, content, or solutions.

items.text: I am willing to develop ideas from scratch rather than only follow templates.
items.text_zh: 我愿意从零开始构思，而不是只按模板执行。
items.text_en: I am willing to develop ideas from scratch rather than only follow templates.

items.text: When something can be made more aesthetic or more personal, I become more engaged.
items.text_zh: 当一件事可以做得更有美感或更有个性时，我会更投入。
items.text_en: When something can be made more aesthetic or more personal, I become more engaged.

items.text: I enjoy creating when there is no single standard answer.
items.text_zh: 我享受在没有标准答案的情况下进行创作。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating when there is no single standard answer.

items.text: I enjoy helping others solve problems.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others solve problems.

items.text: I value team atmosphere and interpersonal relationships.
items.text_zh: 我重视团队氛围和人际关系。
items.text_en: I value team atmosphere and interpersonal relationships.

items.text: I am willing to listen to others patiently.
items.text_zh: 我愿意耐心倾听他人。
items.text_en: I am willing to listen to others patiently.

items.text: Roles that include coaching, support, or service responsibilities appeal to me.
items.text_zh: 包含辅导、支持或服务职责的角色会吸引我。
items.text_en: Roles that include coaching, support, or service responsibilities appeal to me.

items.text: When work can genuinely help other people, I feel a stronger sense of achievement.
items.text_zh: 当工作能真正帮助别人时，我会更有成就感。
items.text_en: When work can genuinely help other people, I feel a stronger sense of achievement.

items.text: I enjoy coordinating collaboration among different people so things move forward smoothly.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢协调多方协作，让事情顺利推进。
items.text_en: I enjoy coordinating collaboration among different people so things move forward smoothly.

items.text: I am willing to spend time understanding other people's needs, emotions, or difficulties.
items.text_zh: 我愿意花时间理解他人的需求、情绪或难处。
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time understanding other people's needs, emotions, or difficulties.

items.text: I enjoy using communication to help others feel more reassured, clearer, or more directed.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过沟通让他人更安心、更清晰或更有方向。
items.text_en: I enjoy using communication to help others feel more reassured, clearer, or more directed.

items.text: Seeing others make progress because of my support feels satisfying to me.
items.text_zh: 看到别人因我的支持而进步，我会很满足。
items.text_en: Seeing others make progress because of my support feels satisfying to me.

items.text: I enjoy work settings that require cooperation, companionship, or group interaction.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢需要合作、陪伴或群体互动的工作场景。
items.text_en: I enjoy work settings that require cooperation, companionship, or group interaction.

items.text: I enjoy influencing others through ideas and viewpoints.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过观点影响他人。
items.text_en: I enjoy influencing others through ideas and viewpoints.

items.text: Taking the lead in moving things forward gives me more motivation.
items.text_zh: 主导推进事项会让我更有动力。
items.text_en: Taking the lead in moving things forward gives me more motivation.

items.text: I enjoy setting goals and driving results to completion.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢设定目标并推动结果达成。
items.text_en: I enjoy setting goals and driving results to completion.

items.text: I can adapt to situations involving negotiation, resource seeking, or persuasion.
items.text_zh: 我能适应谈判、争取资源或说服他人的场景。
items.text_en: I can adapt to situations involving negotiation, resource seeking, or persuasion.

items.text: Business-oriented and growth-oriented challenges appeal to me.
items.text_zh: 偏商业导向、增长导向的挑战会吸引我。
items.text_en: Business-oriented and growth-oriented challenges appeal to me.

items.text: Taking responsibility under pressure gives me a stronger sense of presence.
items.text_zh: 在压力下主动承担责任会让我更有存在感。
items.text_en: Taking responsibility under pressure gives me a stronger sense of presence.

items.text: I am willing to lead the coordination of resources, people, and pace to achieve a goal.
items.text_zh: 我愿意带头组织资源、人和节奏去完成目标。
items.text_en: I am willing to lead the coordination of resources, people, and pace to achieve a goal.

items.text: I enjoy the process of competition, breakthrough, and turning opportunities into results.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢竞争、突破和把机会变成结果的过程。
items.text_en: I enjoy the process of competition, breakthrough, and turning opportunities into results.

items.text: When a project needs someone to step up and make decisions, I am willing to take that role.
items.text_zh: 当一个项目需要有人站出来拍板时，我愿意担当。
items.text_en: When a project needs someone to step up and make decisions, I am willing to take that role.

items.text: I am interested in tasks involving markets, business, entrepreneurship, or external development.
items.text_zh: 我对市场、业务、创业或对外拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving markets, business, entrepreneurship, or external development.

items.text: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.
items.text_zh: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_en: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.

items.text: I value details and quality checks.
items.text_zh: 我重视细节以及质量校验。
items.text_en: I value details and quality checks.

items.text: I enjoy planning, arranging, and tracking progress.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢规划安排并跟踪进度。
items.text_en: I enjoy planning, arranging, and tracking progress.

items.text: For repetitive but important tasks, I can execute steadily and do not reject them.
items.text_zh: 对重复但重要的任务，我能稳定执行并且不排斥。
items.text_en: For repetitive but important tasks, I can execute steadily and do not reject them.

items.text: Standards, consistency, and documentation make me feel more secure.
items.text_zh: 规范、一致性和文档化会让我更安心。
items.text_en: Standards, consistency, and documentation make me feel more secure.

items.text: I enjoy work involving organization, sorting, operations, and execution.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢组织、整理和运营执行类工作。
items.text_en: I enjoy work involving organization, sorting, operations, and execution.

items.text: I am willing to maintain ledgers, checklists, records, or standard operating procedures.
items.text_zh: 我愿意维护台账、清单、记录或标准作业流程。
items.text_en: I am willing to maintain ledgers, checklists, records, or standard operating procedures.

items.text: Environments with clear rules and responsibility boundaries make me more efficient.
items.text_zh: 明确规则和职责边界的环境会让我更高效。
items.text_en: Environments with clear rules and responsibility boundaries make me more efficient.

items.text: I enjoy organizing messy information into clear categories and sequences.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把杂乱信息整理成清楚的分类和顺序。
items.text_en: I enjoy organizing messy information into clear categories and sequences.

items.text: When things are arranged in an orderly way, I feel more satisfied.
items.text_zh: 当事情被安排得井井有条时，我会更有满足感。
items.text_en: When things are arranged in an orderly way, I feel more satisfied.

items.text: I enjoy taking a device apart and understanding how its parts work together.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢拆解一个装置，再理解各部件如何配合。
items.text_en: I enjoy taking a device apart and understanding how its parts work together.

items.text: I am willing to improve finished work through trial assembly, testing, or calibration.
items.text_zh: 我愿意通过试装、调试或校准来改进成品。
items.text_en: I am willing to improve finished work through trial assembly, testing, or calibration.

items.text: Tasks that require quick judgment and on-site problem handling excite me.
items.text_zh: 需要快速判断并现场处理问题的任务会让我兴奋。
items.text_en: Tasks that require quick judgment and on-site problem handling excite me.

items.text: I enjoy turning drawings, instructions, or ideas into physical outcomes.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把图纸、说明或想法转成实物成果。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning drawings, instructions, or ideas into physical outcomes.

items.text: When equipment or processes behave abnormally, I want to investigate them myself.
items.text_zh: 面对器材或流程异常，我会想亲自去排查。
items.text_en: When equipment or processes behave abnormally, I want to investigate them myself.

items.text: I am interested in hands-on tasks that require endurance, coordination, or spatial awareness.
items.text_zh: 我对需要耐力、协调或空间感的实操任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in hands-on tasks that require endurance, coordination, or spatial awareness.

items.text: I prefer work environments where I can see equipment, materials, samples, or objects of operation.
items.text_zh: 我偏好能看到设备、材料、样品或操作对象的工作环境。
items.text_en: I prefer work environments where I can see equipment, materials, samples, or objects of operation.

items.text: Compared with a purely office-based environment, I prefer settings with a sense of site work or contact with physical objects.
items.text_zh: 比起纯办公室环境，我更喜欢带有现场感或实物接触的场景。
items.text_en: Compared with a purely office-based environment, I prefer settings with a sense of site work or contact with physical objects.

items.text: Working with real systems, real products, or real spaces makes me more engaged.
items.text_zh: 能够在真实系统、真实产品或真实空间中工作，会让我更投入。
items.text_en: Working with real systems, real products, or real spaces makes me more engaged.

items.text: In a team, I am willing to take on installation, implementation, or practical execution roles.
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意承担安装、实施或落地执行的角色。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to take on installation, implementation, or practical execution roles.

items.text: When a project reaches the stage of making the plan real, I want to be more involved.
items.text_zh: 当项目进入“把方案做出来”的阶段，我会更想参与。
items.text_en: When a project reaches the stage of making the plan real, I want to be more involved.

items.text: I prefer being the person who gets things built and stabilized, rather than staying only at the discussion level.
items.text_zh: 我更喜欢成为把事情做成、做稳的人，而不是只停留在讨论层面。
items.text_en: I prefer being the person who gets things built and stabilized, rather than staying only at the discussion level.

items.text: I enjoy reading reports, papers, or materials to build my judgment.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢阅读报告、论文或资料来建立判断。
items.text_en: I enjoy reading reports, papers, or materials to build my judgment.

items.text: Comparing, classifying, and verifying a problem gives me a sense of satisfaction.
items.text_zh: 对一个问题进行比较、分类和验证会让我有满足感。
items.text_en: Comparing, classifying, and verifying a problem gives me a sense of satisfaction.

items.text: I enjoy designing a research path rather than only accepting ready-made answers.
items.text_zh: 我乐于设计研究路径，而不只是接受现成答案。
items.text_en: I enjoy designing a research path rather than only accepting ready-made answers.

items.text: I enjoy using models, frameworks, or hypotheses to understand complex phenomena.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢用模型、框架或假设来理解复杂现象。
items.text_en: I enjoy using models, frameworks, or hypotheses to understand complex phenomena.

items.text: Tasks that require precise reasoning appeal to me more than emotion-driven judgments.
items.text_zh: 需要精确推理的任务比情绪化判断更吸引我。
items.text_en: Tasks that require precise reasoning appeal to me more than emotion-driven judgments.

items.text: I am willing to check information repeatedly to confirm whether a conclusion is reliable.
items.text_zh: 我愿意反复核对信息，只为确认结论是否可靠。
items.text_en: I am willing to check information repeatedly to confirm whether a conclusion is reliable.

items.text: I prefer work environments that encourage questions, challenge, and verification.
items.text_zh: 我偏好鼓励提问、质疑和求证的工作环境。
items.text_en: I prefer work environments that encourage questions, challenge, and verification.

items.text: I usually perform better in settings where I can think quietly and research deeply.
items.text_zh: 在可以安静思考、深入研究的场景里，我通常表现更好。
items.text_en: I usually perform better in settings where I can think quietly and research deeply.

items.text: I enjoy organizational climates that value professional judgment and evidence quality.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢重视专业判断和证据质量的组织氛围。
items.text_en: I enjoy organizational climates that value professional judgment and evidence quality.

items.text: In a team, I am willing to play the role of analyst, researcher, or problem diagnostician.
items.text_zh: 在团队里，我愿意扮演分析者、研究者或问题诊断者。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to play the role of analyst, researcher, or problem diagnostician.

items.text: When others need to make sense of a complex problem, I am willing to take it on.
items.text_zh: 当别人需要把复杂问题想清楚时，我愿意接手。
items.text_en: When others need to make sense of a complex problem, I am willing to take it on.

items.text: I would rather be needed for seeing deeply and thinking accurately.
items.text_zh: 我更希望因“看得深、想得准”而被需要。
items.text_en: I would rather be needed for seeing deeply and thinking accurately.

items.text: I enjoy giving ordinary content a distinctive style.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把普通内容做出独特风格。
items.text_en: I enjoy giving ordinary content a distinctive style.

items.text: I am willing to polish the form, wording, or aesthetic effect of a piece of work repeatedly.
items.text_zh: 我愿意为一个作品反复打磨形式、语感或审美效果。
items.text_en: I am willing to polish the form, wording, or aesthetic effect of a piece of work repeatedly.

items.text: I enjoy generating ideas from inspiration, emotion, or experience.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从灵感、情绪或体验中生成创意。
items.text_en: I enjoy generating ideas from inspiration, emotion, or experience.

items.text: When a situation calls for breaking convention and thinking from another angle, I feel more excited.
items.text_zh: 当需要打破常规、换个角度思考时，我会更兴奋。
items.text_en: When a situation calls for breaking convention and thinking from another angle, I feel more excited.

items.text: I enjoy turning complex ideas into more compelling expression.
items.text_zh: 我乐于把复杂想法转成更有感染力的表达。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning complex ideas into more compelling expression.

items.text: I am interested in branding, storytelling, content, visual, or experience design.
items.text_zh: 我对品牌、叙事、内容、视觉或体验设计有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in branding, storytelling, content, visual, or experience design.

items.text: I enjoy work environments that allow experimentation and personal expression.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢允许试错和个性表达的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy work environments that allow experimentation and personal expression.

items.text: I become more engaged in teams where aesthetics, creativity, and independent judgment are respected.
items.text_zh: 在审美、创意和独立判断被尊重的团队里，我会更投入。
items.text_en: I become more engaged in teams where aesthetics, creativity, and independent judgment are respected.

items.text: Overly rigid and standardized environments suppress my performance.
items.text_zh: 过于僵化、标准化的环境会压制我的发挥。
items.text_en: Overly rigid and standardized environments suppress my performance.

items.text: In a team, I am willing to take on the role of idea contributor or content shaper.
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意承担创意提出者或内容塑造者的角色。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to take on the role of idea contributor or content shaper.

items.text: When a project needs to become more expressive, I want to join in.
items.text_zh: 当一个项目需要“让它更有表达力”时，我会想加入。
items.text_en: When a project needs to become more expressive, I want to join in.

items.text: I would rather be noticed for being novel, perceptive, and full of ideas.
items.text_zh: 我更希望因新颖、敏感和有想法而被看到。
items.text_en: I would rather be noticed for being novel, perceptive, and full of ideas.

items.text: I enjoy helping others clarify problems, not just giving answers.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人厘清问题，而不只是给出答案。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others clarify problems, not just giving answers.

items.text: I am willing to help different sides restore understanding during conflict or disagreement.
items.text_zh: 我愿意在冲突或分歧中帮助各方恢复理解。
items.text_en: I am willing to help different sides restore understanding during conflict or disagreement.

items.text: I am interested in tasks involving training, coaching, companionship, or community support.
items.text_zh: 我对培训、辅导、陪伴或社区支持类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving training, coaching, companionship, or community support.

items.text: I enjoy helping others move forward with more clarity through questions and feedback.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过提问和反馈帮助别人更清晰地前进。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others move forward with more clarity through questions and feedback.

items.text: I enjoy helping new members, people in weaker positions, or people who feel lost feel supported.
items.text_zh: 我乐于让新成员、更弱势者或更迷茫的人感到被接住。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping new members, people in weaker positions, or people who feel lost feel supported.

items.text: I am willing to spend time making team relationships smoother and more trusting.
items.text_zh: 我愿意花时间让团队关系更顺畅、更有信任。
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time making team relationships smoother and more trusting.

items.text: I enjoy work environments with strong collaboration and mutual support.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢合作氛围强、彼此支持的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy work environments with strong collaboration and mutual support.

items.text: I feel more motivated in settings where I can stay in contact with real people and real needs.
items.text_zh: 在能持续接触真实人群和真实需求的场景里，我会更有动力。
items.text_en: I feel more motivated in settings where I can stay in contact with real people and real needs.

items.text: I prefer organizations that value service, education, public benefit, or community value.
items.text_zh: 我偏好重视服务、教育、公益或社区价值的组织。
items.text_en: I prefer organizations that value service, education, public benefit, or community value.

items.text: In a team, I am willing to play the role of coordinator, supporter, or enabler.
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意扮演协调者、支持者或赋能者。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to play the role of coordinator, supporter, or enabler.

items.text: When people need someone who can connect them, I am willing to step forward.
items.text_zh: 当大家需要一个能把人连接起来的人时，我愿意站出来。
items.text_en: When people need someone who can connect them, I am willing to step forward.

items.text: I would rather be recognized for helping others become better.
items.text_zh: 我更希望因“让别人变得更好”而被认可。
items.text_en: I would rather be recognized for helping others become better.

items.text: I enjoy turning a vague opportunity into a clear result.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把一个模糊机会推进成明确结果。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning a vague opportunity into a clear result.

items.text: I am willing to proactively seek resources, cooperation, or support to move goals forward.
items.text_zh: 我愿意主动争取资源、合作或支持来推动目标。
items.text_en: I am willing to proactively seek resources, cooperation, or support to move goals forward.

items.text: When public expression, presenting a proposal, or mobilizing others is needed, I usually do not reject it.
items.text_zh: 当需要公开表达、展示方案或带动他人时，我通常不排斥。
items.text_en: When public expression, presenting a proposal, or mobilizing others is needed, I usually do not reject it.

items.text: I enjoy judging direction amid uncertainty and taking the first step.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢在不确定中判断方向并先行一步。
items.text_en: I enjoy judging direction amid uncertainty and taking the first step.

items.text: I am interested in tasks involving sales, business development, growth, fundraising, or project expansion.
items.text_zh: 我对销售、商务、增长、筹资或项目拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving sales, business development, growth, fundraising, or project expansion.

items.text: When the goal is clear and challenging, I naturally enter a drive-forward state.
items.text_zh: 当目标清晰且有挑战时，我会自然进入推进状态。
items.text_en: When the goal is clear and challenging, I naturally enter a drive-forward state.

items.text: I enjoy fast-paced, strongly results-oriented work environments.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢节奏快、结果导向强的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy fast-paced, strongly results-oriented work environments.

items.text: I feel more excited in settings where I can take on greater responsibility and influence larger outcomes.
items.text_zh: 在可以承担更大责任、影响更大结果的场景里，我会更兴奋。
items.text_en: I feel more excited in settings where I can take on greater responsibility and influence larger outcomes.

items.text: I prefer organizational climates that encourage experimentation, competition, and proactively seeking opportunities.
items.text_zh: 我偏好鼓励试错、竞争和主动争取机会的组织氛围。
items.text_en: I prefer organizational climates that encourage experimentation, competition, and proactively seeking opportunities.

items.text: In a team, I am willing to serve as the person in charge, initiator, or external representative.
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意担当负责人、发起人或对外代表。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to serve as the person in charge, initiator, or external representative.

items.text: When a project needs someone to set direction, set pace, and push implementation, I am willing to take it on.
items.text_zh: 当项目需要有人定方向、定节奏并推动落地时，我愿意接手。
items.text_en: When a project needs someone to set direction, set pace, and push implementation, I am willing to take it on.

items.text: I would rather be trusted for being able to get things done.
items.text_zh: 我更希望因“能把事做成”而被信任。
items.text_en: I would rather be trusted for being able to get things done.

items.text: I enjoy creating templates, rules, or checklists to reduce disorder.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢建立模板、规则或清单来减少混乱。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating templates, rules, or checklists to reduce disorder.

items.text: I am willing to keep data, records, and documents accurate over time.
items.text_zh: 我愿意持续维护数据、记录和文档的准确性。
items.text_en: I am willing to keep data, records, and documents accurate over time.

items.text: I enjoy breaking a process into repeatable steps.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把一个流程拆成可重复执行的步骤。
items.text_en: I enjoy breaking a process into repeatable steps.

items.text: When a task requires patient checking, review, and filing, I can usually stay engaged.
items.text_zh: 当任务需要耐心校对、复核和归档时，我通常能投入。
items.text_en: When a task requires patient checking, review, and filing, I can usually stay engaged.

items.text: I am interested in tasks involving budgeting, scheduling, ledgers, process management, or administrative operations.
items.text_zh: 我对预算、排期、台账、流程管理或行政运营类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving budgeting, scheduling, ledgers, process management, or administrative operations.

items.text: I enjoy making collaboration more orderly, trackable, and transferable.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢让协作过程更有秩序、可跟踪、可交接。
items.text_en: I enjoy making collaboration more orderly, trackable, and transferable.

items.text: I enjoy work environments with clear responsibilities, clear standards, and a stable rhythm.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢职责清晰、标准明确、节奏稳定的工作环境。
items.text_en: I enjoy work environments with clear responsibilities, clear standards, and a stable rhythm.

items.text: I am usually more efficient in organizations with clear rules and complete materials.
items.text_zh: 在规则清楚、资料完整的组织里，我通常更高效。
items.text_en: I am usually more efficient in organizations with clear rules and complete materials.

items.text: I prefer team climates that value compliance, accuracy, and delivery quality.
items.text_zh: 我偏好重视合规、准确和交付质量的团队氛围。
items.text_en: I prefer team climates that value compliance, accuracy, and delivery quality.

items.text: In a team, I am willing to play the role of planner, recorder, or process guardian.
items.text_zh: 在团队中，我愿意扮演计划者、记录者或流程守护者。
items.text_en: In a team, I am willing to play the role of planner, recorder, or process guardian.

items.text: When things start to become messy, I want to restore order.
items.text_zh: 当事情开始变乱时，我会想把它重新整理出秩序。
items.text_en: When things start to become messy, I want to restore order.

items.text: I would rather be needed for being reliable, detail-oriented, and reusable.
items.text_zh: 我更希望因可靠、细致和可复用而被需要。
items.text_en: I would rather be needed for being reliable, detail-oriented, and reusable.

items.text: To confirm that you are answering attentively, please choose '3 Unsure / neutral' for this item.
items.text_zh: 为了确认你有认真作答，请本题选择“3 不确定 / 中立”。
items.text_en: To confirm that you are answering attentively, please choose '3 Unsure / neutral' for this item.

items.text: I am equally interested in almost every type of work.
items.text_zh: 我对几乎所有类型的工作都同样感兴趣。
items.text_en: I am equally interested in almost every type of work.

items.text: I never make mistakes in any situation.
items.text_zh: 我从不在任何情境下犯错。
items.text_en: I never make mistakes in any situation.

items.text: Even when work content is completely unfamiliar, I can always like it immediately.
items.text_zh: 即使工作内容完全陌生，我也总能立刻喜欢上它。
items.text_en: Even when work content is completely unfamiliar, I can always like it immediately.

items.text: To confirm attention, please choose '2 Dislike' for this item.
items.text_zh: 为了确认注意力，本题请选择“2 不喜欢”。
items.text_en: To confirm attention, please choose '2 Dislike' for this item.

items.text: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.
items.text_zh: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_en: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.

items.text: I enjoy helping others solve problems.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others solve problems.

items.text: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.
items.text_zh: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_en: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.
